nodes.name: Webhook — Update Lead Stage
nodes.notes:
POST body: { lead_id, stage, note? }
Stages: 0=identified, 1=dm_sent, 2=dm_replied, 3=form_sent, 4=form_filled, 5=call_booked, 6=call_completed, 7=closed, 8=lost

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=📞 *Call Booked!*

Lead ID: `{{ $('wf3-build-patch').item.json.lead_id }}`
Stage: Call Booked (5)
Time: {{ new Date().toLocaleString('en-PH', {timeZone:'Asia/Manila'}) }}

Check CRM → https://inboundos.vercel.app/micko-cruz/crm

meta.description: Workflow 3 — DM Lead Tracker. Webhook POST to /workflow3-update-lead with { lead_id, stage, note?, call_outcome? }. Updates outreach_leads stage in Supabase. Fires Telegram alert when call is booked (stage=5). Stage map: 0=identified, 1=dm_sent, 2=dm_replied, 3=form_sent, 4=form_filled, 5=call_booked, 6=call_completed, 7=closed, 8=lost.
